title: Graduate Commencement
location: Yerba Buena Center for the Arts
description: Celebrate with our graduate students as they complete their advanced degrees and embark on the next chapter.
longDescription: The afternoon ceremony of CCA's 119th Commencement honors our graduate Class of 2026 — scholars, researchers, and practitioners who have pushed the boundaries of art, design, architecture, and writing at the highest level. This celebration recognizes their dedication to advanced study and the impact their work will have on communities worldwide.

studentSpeaker.name: Jordan Rivera
studentSpeaker.speechHighlights: Jordan will speak on the role of speculative practice in shaping resilient futures, drawing on their thesis research in climate fiction.
